data.title: Set up .skogai symlinks and integrations
data.description:
Connect .skogai directories to where they need to be accessible.

Done:

- [X] .skogai/skills → .claude/skills
- [X] .skogai/.envrc → .envrc (direnv, adds .skogai/bin to PATH)
- [X] bin/ symlink (skogai-todo accessible)
- [X] tasks/ symlink

Remaining (depends on audit findings):

- [ ] Identify which other .skogai directories need symlinks
- [ ] Determine correct symlink targets for each
- [ ] Verify all symlinks resolve correctly (relative path gotcha)
